cv.title: Senior Frontend / Product Engineer
summary: Frontend/Fullstack Developer with over 10 years of experience building scalable digital products for major banks and e-commerce platforms.

Specialist in React, Next.js and frontend architecture, with a strong focus on performance, user experience and business impact. Works at the intersection of engineering and product, actively contributing to defining solutions that increase conversion, engagement and operational efficiency.
Solid experience in agile environments, scalable architecture (Clean Architecture, DDD) and building reusable Design Systems.
differentials: Strong product orientation and business impact focus
Ability to connect technology, UX and business metrics
Track record in agile teams and high-performance environments
experienceBullets: Developed the insurance platform with a focus on performance, scalability and user experience.
Structured reusable component architecture with Design System and Storybook, increasing consistency and development speed.
Implemented modern interfaces with React and Next.js, optimizing rendering (SSR) and performance.
Worked on integration with microservices via GraphQL and NestJS.
Improved code quality through automated testing and code review practices.
Optimized the e-commerce experience, directly impacting usability and conversion.
Developed complex interfaces with React, Next.js and Styled Components.
Implemented tracking and monitoring with GTM for user behavior analysis.
Contributed to application stability with automated tests and best practices.
Developed administrative dashboards and internal tools, improving operational efficiency.
Worked on web application development with React and Next.js, including the institutional website and blog.
Worked with legacy systems (AngularJS, WordPress), ensuring continuous evolution.
Created webviews, landing pages and campaigns focused on conversion.
Developed applications with Angular, TypeScript and Bootstrap.
Created responsive and performant interfaces with HTML5, CSS3 and SASS.
Developed responsive and scalable web applications.
Structured frontend architecture focused on reusability and performance.
Worked with Vue.js, Angular and modern CSS tools.
Developed e-commerce interfaces focused on conversion and performance.
Worked with AngularJS, Razor and backend integration.
Implemented technical SEO strategies and performance optimizations.
Developed UI components for large-scale e-commerce.
Worked with JavaScript, Java and corporate architecture.
Developed interfaces for high-traffic portals.
Applied advanced SEO and performance techniques.
Developed internal systems and institutional portals.
Fullstack work with PHP, MySQL and JavaScript.
educationDegrees: Postgraduate in Software Engineering with Applied AI
